title: GermanMiner Modpack
description: A community Modpack to enhance your experience on the GermanMiner.de server. Fully compatible with LabyMod and OptiFine resource packs & feature parity.
body:
### A fully client-side Fabric Modpack with seamless LabyMod compatibility and lots of Features like:
- Optimized game performance in single- and multiplayer
- Full OptiFine feature and Ressourcepack support
- More animations, particles, and sounds
- Schematic support with Litematica
and way more, while being fully compatible with GermanMiner.


**Please use [the 1.21.10 Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/germanminer/versions?g=1.21.10) as that's the actual Server version of GM (as of 12.01.2025), even though they advertise up to 1.21.11!**

This is a Fan made project and not affiliated with GermanMiner, staips IT services or Mojang Studios.
